compose.title: Docker compose
compose.description: Here is the ready to use configuration. It will set up both the Board Games Tracker application and a PostgreSQL database.

run.title: Docker run
run.description: If you want you can use the following docker run command as well. It will start the boardgame tracker docker and presumes the PostgreSQL container is already running.

quickStart.title: Quick Start Guide
quickStart.description: Follow these steps to quickly get your Board Games Tracker up and running:
quickStart.step1Description: Download the latest docker-compose.yml file and make any necessary adjustments to the configuration.
quickStart.step2Description: Make sure to upate the DB_PASSWORD, TZ and JWT_SECRET environment variables in the docker compose file. When changes are done you can start the docker stack with the docker up command. It will start the boardgame tracker docker and the needed PostgreSQL container.
quickStart.step3Description: Open your browser to http://localhost:5444 and login with the default credentials: admin / admin. Don't forget to change these credentials after your first login.

envVars.title: Environment Variables
envVars.description: Configure your application using the followingenvironment variables. Some of them have default values and are not mandatory to set, but you can override them if needed.

jwtSecret.info: Used for signing JWT tokens. Change this to a strong, random value with minimul of 64 characters.

dbPassword.info: Password used to connect to the database.

logLevel.info: Sets the logging level for the application. Possible values are debug, info, warn, error.

sentryLogging.info: Enables or disables the collection of usage statistics. Set to true to enable, false to disable.

authEnabled.info: Set to false to disable authentication and allow anyone to access the application.

proxy.title: Proxy Setup
proxy.description: Here are sample Traefik labels you can add to the docker compose to configure Traefik. Make sure to adjust the labels according to your Traefik setup and domain configuration.
